name: 浴室/私密空間
description: 假夫妻在私密空間的互動天然帶有曖昧張力，幫忙洗澡的設定製造身體接觸的尷尬與心動，推進感情升溫。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: Help me undress. Whatever. It's not like he's taking advantage of me. Well, look who has abs. / Pass me the body wash. It's the last one on the right. Did he actually buy my entire product line?
examples.context: 假夫妻在私密空間的互動天然帶有曖昧張力，幫忙洗澡的設定製造身體接觸的尷尬與心動，推進感情升溫。
